title: senna surattensis subsp. glauca
intro: Senna surattensis subsp. glauca, also known as blue cassia, is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of senna surattensis subsp. glauca include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce fever. Senna surattensis subsp. glauca can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and has also been used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
